waiver.reason_summary: The remote build-server gate could not be reached or stayed unavailable long enough to block the governed pre-push path.
waiver.detail: Remote gate SSH stalled: SSH connects to 10.10.10.30 but remote gate script hangs (no output after 4+ minutes). Build server reachable but gate unresponsive.
substitute_evidence: cherry-pick of validated commit a69d9f9a4 (Phase 2 sync script and PlaneClient extensions
already validated in prior push session)
